name: SmartCaptions
tagline: AI Captions & Subtitles for Premiere Pro, in One Click
voice: Editor-to-editor, plain and confident, no hype. Blue (#1667ff) is the brand and carries UI surfaces; the logo's orange (#f7941d) and amber (#f9b233) are energy accents for highlights and caption emphasis only, never backgrounds. Captions read as captions: high-contrast white text on dark. Premiere Pro is the stage, the panel is the tool; show the work getting shorter.
